channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Federal Crackdown: Puerto Rico Drug Trafficking Bust
item.description:
Federal agents arrested four suspects in a large-scale drug trafficking ring that used U.S. mail to ship controlled substances from Puerto Rico to Massachusetts.

Key points:
• A federal grand jury in Boston indicted four individuals — Alexander Pineda Nunez, Angel Luis Cedeno Moni, Raymond Cedeno Calderon, and Adrian Pena Rodriguez — on charges of conspiracy to distribute controlled substances.
• The ring allegedly shipped kilogram quantities of cocaine from Puerto Rico and fentanyl and methamphetamine from California to residential addresses across northeastern Massachusetts via the U.S. mail.
• Investigators intercepted multiple packages during the investigation, including one seized directly from Pena Rodriguez containing multiple kilograms of cocaine; six California-origin packages seized in late 2025 contained multiple kilograms of fentanyl and methamphetamine.
• The conspiracy charge carries a potential sentence of at least 10 years up to life in prison, with fines of up to $10 million.

Read the full article: Federal Crackdown: Puerto Rico Drug Trafficking Bust

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
